English
KNOW YOUR RIGHTS
You have constitutional rights: • DO NOT OPEN THE DOOR if an immigration agent is knocking. • REMAIN SILENT. You have the right to not answer questions. • DO NOT SIGN ANYTHING without talking to a lawyer first. • PASS THIS CARD to the agent under the door.
OFFICER: I AM EXERCISING MY RIGHTS
I do not wish to speak with you, answer your questions, or sign or hand you any documents based on my 5th Amendment rights. I do not give you permission to enter my home based on my 4th Amendment rights unless you have a warrant signed by a judge. I do not give you permission to search any of my belongings.
Español (Spanish)
USTED TIENE DERECHOS CONSTITUCIONALES
• NO ABRA LA PUERTA si un agente de inmigración está tocando la puerta. • NO CONTESTE NINGUNA PREGUNTA. Usted tiene el derecho de mantenerse callado. • NO FIRME NADA sin antes hablar con un abogado. • ENTREGUE ESTA TARJETA AL AGENTE. Pásela debajo de la puerta.
OFFICER: I AM EXERCISING MY RIGHTS
I do not wish to speak with you, answer your questions, or sign or hand you any documents based on my 5th Amendment rights. I do not give you permission to enter my home based on my 4th Amendment rights unless you have a warrant signed by a judge. I do not give you permission to search any of my belongings.
Português (Portuguese)
VOCÊ TEM DIREITOS CONSTITUCIONAIS
• NÃO ABRA A PORTA se um agente de imigração bater à porta. • NÃO RESPONDA A NENHUMA PERGUNTA. Você tem o direito de permanecer em silêncio. • NÃO ASSINE NADA sem antes falar com um advogado. • ENTREGUE ESTE CARTÃO AO AGENTE. Deslize-o por baixo da porta.
OFFICER: I AM EXERCISING MY RIGHTS
I do not wish to speak with you, answer your questions, or sign or hand you any documents based on my 5th Amendment rights. I do not give you permission to enter my home based on my 4th Amendment rights unless you have a warrant signed by a judge. I do not give you permission to search any of my belongings.
Kreyòl Ayisyen (Haitian Creole)
OU GEN DWA KONSTITISYONÈL
• PA LOUVRI PÒT LA si yon ajan imigrasyon frape nan pòt la. • PA REPONN OKENN KEKSYON. Ou gen dwa pou rete an silans. • PA SIYEN ANYEN san ou pa pale avèk yon avoka anvan. • BAY AJAN AN KAT SA A. Glise li anba pòt la.
OFFICER: I AM EXERCISING MY RIGHTS
I do not wish to speak with you, answer your questions, or sign or hand you any documents based on my 5th Amendment rights. I do not give you permission to enter my home based on my 4th Amendment rights unless you have a warrant signed by a judge. I do not give you permission to search any of my belongings.
